recommendations.description: The JC Road and Sagar Theatre corridor (30,675 violations) is Bangalore's most critical wrong-parking zone. Vehicles parked on both sides of JC Road narrow a 4-lane arterial to a single passable lane during peak hours, causing cascading congestion across Shivananda Circle and Halasuru Gate.
recommendations.patrol_time_window: 7-9 AM and 5-8 PM on all weekdays
recommendations.enforcement_action: Deploy tow truck + 3-officer challan team at BTP044 (Sagar Theatre) and BTP040 (Elite Junction) simultaneously

junctions_covered: BTP062 - Basava Mantapa, Dr. Rajkumar Road
BTP011 - RR Kalyana Mantapa, Dr. Rajkumar Road
recommendations.description: The Rajajinagar corridor from RR Kalyana Mantapa to ESI Hospital (13,603 violations) shows persistent wrong-parking blocking the Dr. Rajkumar Road service lane. Commercial delivery vehicles dominate violations between 9 AM-12 PM, blocking bus routes and emergency access.
recommendations.enforcement_action: Tow truck deployment for commercial vehicles + penalty notice blitz for private vehicles at BTP010 and BTP062

recommendations.description: Central Street Junction and Safina Plaza (10,419 violations) form a high-density commercial corridor where wrong parking reduces effective road width by 40%. The Balekundri Indian Express area sees peak violations during morning newspaper distribution hours.
recommendations.enforcement_action: Early morning patrol with challan drive + visible police presence at BTP051 (Safina Plaza) and BTP211 (Central Street)

recommendations.description: This cluster (5,505 no-parking violations) spans a residential-commercial transition zone with no clear junction anchors, indicating widespread footpath and yellow-line violations by commuters using the area as a transit halt. Vehicle diversity is high — cars, two-wheelers, and autos all contribute.
recommendations.enforcement_action: Penalty notice blitz targeting yellow-line violations + install temporary no-parking signage with challan threat

recommendations.description: The ASC Junction to Safina Plaza stretch (2,354 no-parking violations) is a high-footfall zone near Minsk Square. Violations cluster around office opening and closing times, with vehicles parked in bus bay zones blocking BMTC routes and creating pedestrian hazards.
recommendations.enforcement_action: Visible traffic warden at BTP042 (Minsk Square) + instant challan for bus-bay parking; coordinate with BMTC on complaint data
